# Ganirelix Acetate 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Ganirelix Acetate 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Ganirelix Acetate</strong> 目前有 <strong>29 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Ganirelix Acetate 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Prevention of premature luteinising hormone (LH) surges in women undergoing controlled ovarian hyperstimulation (COH) for assisted reproduction techniques (ART).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>hypertrichosis (disease)（100.0%）</li>
<li>Ambras type hypertrichosis universalis congenita（100.0%）</li>
<li>malformation syndrome with odontal and/or periodontal component（100.0%）</li>
<li>syndrome with a Dandy-Walker malformation as major feature（100.0%）</li>
<li>isolated genetic hair shaft abnormality（100.0%）</li>
<li>familial male-limited precocious puberty（99.8%）</li>
<li>persistent fetal circulation syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>aromatase excess syndrome（99.8%）</li>
<li>centra precocious puberty 1（99.8%）</li>
<li>familial isolated trichomegaly（99.8%）</li>
<li>pelvic organ prolapse（99.6%）</li>
<li>female genital tuberculosis（99.6%）</li>
<li>physiological sexual disorder（99.6%）</li>
<li>idiopathic central precocious puberty（99.6%）</li>
<li>dysplasia of cervix（99.5%）</li>
<li>X-linked congenital generalized hypertrichosis（99.5%）</li>
<li>precocious puberty, central, 2（99.5%）</li>
<li>diffuse cutaneous mastocytosis（99.4%）</li>
<li>genetic alopecia（99.4%）</li>
<li>precocious puberty（99.3%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/ganirelix-acetate/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
